title: WhosLow
description: Simple mod that removes the guessing work from knowing if you are lower than your enemy.
body:
![very cool](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7e136cfa214df01d88a3925d636465e007ba3934_0.webp)WhosLow is a lightweight, client-side combat mod that adds dynamic glowing outlines to players during an active engagement.

Designed entirely around providing clear and immediate visual feedback, the mod activates a glowing outline on your opponent the moment you land a successful hit. To help you evaluate the fight at a glance, the color of the outline automatically shifts based on how the target's current health stacks up against your own.

Out of the box, the mod uses a simple and intuitive color system: an opponent will glow red if they have less health than you, yellow if your health pools are exactly tied, and green if they currently possess more health than you do. This allows you to quickly gauge the state of the battle without taking your eyes off the action to read numbers or chat messages.

Every aspect of the mod is built to be unobtrusive and straightforward. If you want a different visual style, all three health-state colors can be fully customized at any time through the Mod Menu configuration screen. It is a simple, highly responsive visual upgrade for multiplayer combat.
Made by Mathew
